complaint: I keep smelling burning oil and there's a faint wisp of smoke from under the hood after I park, it smells hot and scary like it could ignite.
observations: Oil weeping onto exhaust manifold burns off as light smoke after shutdown
Valve cover gasket saturated, oil pooled at spark plug tube seals
No active coolant or fuel leak, oil level slightly low
provenance: Scenario: blind subagent (overcall-probe-v1, blind to held severity diff/anchors/existing cases). Severity+cost: Kai domain review 2026-06-13 (drive/don't-drive rule; sourced market cost). Diagnosis slug proposed from repair_target 'valve cover gasket'.
